decision_rationale: Family resolver kept executable S3.2 profile 's3_migrate_cloudfront_oac_private' because Terraform can merge the current bucket policy at apply time. Runtime capture failed (NoSuchBucket), so the customer-run Terraform bundle must fetch the live bucket policy. Run creation did not require additional risk-only acceptance.

title: S3 general purpose buckets should block public read access
